meta.description: Meet the team at AnaBella Family and Cosmetic Dentistry today. We are here to serve the people of Bellevue WA.

paragraphs: Clara Song, DDS, is the founder of AnaBella Family and Cosmetic Dentistry. Dr. Song provides compassionate cosmetic, family, and general dentistry services to patients in Kirkland & Bellevue, Washington.

Dr. Song majored in music at Pacific Union College in Napa Valley, California. She then earned her Doctor of Dental Surgery from Loma Linda University School of Dentistry. She is a graduate of the prestigious Las Vegas Institute for Advanced Dental Studies — the world's premier postgraduate dental teaching center — which qualifies her as one of the most progressive cosmetic dentists in the world.

She started her first practice in 2001, in Dalton, Georgia. Even in a small community, Dr. Song created a highly-respected, highly-successful dental practice, where patients came from hundreds of miles away to receive her cosmetic treatments. Through many acts of Providence, Dr. Song moved to Bellevue, Washington, in 2007. AnaBella Family and Cosmetic Dentistry-Bellevue is the practice of her dreams and the culmination of many hours of searching and planning.

From the moment you enter through the doors, you will feel the warm and friendly atmosphere of AnaBella Family and Cosmetic Dentistry. It is an atmosphere that Dr. Song and the entire staff are committed to providing their patients on a consistent basis. Whether you are a patient for full-mouth cosmetic dentistry treatment, routine dental cleanings, a child seeking dental treatment, or a walk-in, you will receive the same welcome and the highest quality of care.

Dr. Song devotes hundreds of hours a year to continuing education. She is committed to staying informed of the new techniques and the latest discoveries in cosmetic and biological dentistry. This ensures her patients receive the most up-to-date techniques, materials, and options for their dental treatment.

Dr. Song's philosophy is built on the belief that patients trust her with their dreams of a perfect smile. To that end, she is uncompromising. AnaBella Family and Cosmetic Dentistry invites you to make an appointment for a consultation and meet Dr. Song for yourself. Her humble, caring, and professional attitude will be evident, and you will immediately see why so many patients trust their dental care to Dr. Song and AnaBella Family and Cosmetic Dentistry.

We are thrilled to extend a warm and hearty welcome to Dr. Eric Kim as the newest member of our dental family! It brings me immense joy to see our dental office growing and thriving with such talented and passionate professionals like Dr. Eric Kim. As we embark on this new chapter together, I am confident that his expertise and dedication will further elevate the level of care and service we provide to our valued patients.

Dr. Kim comes to us with an impressive background and a commitment to excellence in dentistry. His clinical skills and patient-centric approach align perfectly with our practice's values and philosophy. With a strong focus on continuing education and staying abreast of the latest advancements in the field, I have no doubt that Dr. Kim will make a significant impact on our team and contribute to the overall success of our dental office. Originally from the Pacific Northwest, Dr. Kim graduated from the University of Washington in Seattle with a major in General Biology. He then went on to earn his Doctor of Dental Surgery degree from Loma Linda University School of Dentistry, where he excelled and graduated in the top ten clinical percentages of his class. With a passion for dentistry and a commitment to excellence, Dr. Kim is a valuable asset to our practice, and we are excited to have him on board.

We believe that Dr. Kim's skills and compassionate approach to dentistry align perfectly with our practice's values. Together, with the rest of our team, we will continue to pursue our mission of delivering exceptional dental care to each and every one of our valued patients. During your next visit to our office, we encourage you to take a moment to get to know Dr. Kim. We are confident that you will find his warm and friendly demeanor as comforting as his expertise is impressive. Once again, I extend my warmest welcome to Dr. Kim. Together, let us continue to strive for excellence and make a positive difference in the lives of those we serve.
Dental Assistant

Hannah attended the University of California, Berkeley and Mills College where she studied Biology with a minor in Military Science and Business Administration. She enjoys traveling to other countries trying new foods.
Dental Assistant

In June 2022, Antanina received her Dental Assistant Certification. As a child, she dreamed of working in the dental office and making a difference in the lives of others. She enjoys working with patients and helping them achieve a healthy smile.

Brandi has worked in the dental field for over fifteen years. Through the years, she has had great opportunities to expand her knowledge in the dental, TMJ, cosmetic and implantology fields. Brandi thoroughly enjoys working with the team to ensure all of our patients receive the highest level of care.

AnaBella Family and Cosmetic Dentistry
11216 NE 15th St Suite A
Bellevue WA 98004
(425) 454-3221
